results: save-as safety artifact: 13 source checks, 9 scenarios, 1 deferred risk, no absolute user paths
newEvidence: Save As uses picker-bound source IDs instead of exposing paths to renderer output.
Same-source Save As target is rejected; sibling edited target is allowed.
Logs and save response are redacted or basename-only.
